response.justification: Bogdan has a highly relevant technical background for an Engineering Productivity role, with extensive experience building test frameworks, CI/CD pipelines, and mobile device orchestration tools. However, his resume lacks any explicit mention of formal people management, such as conducting 1-on-1s or managing direct reports, making him a risky fit for a Level II Manager position despite his strong Staff-level technical leadership.
strengths: Extensive experience building developer tools, test automation frameworks, and CI/CD pipelines.
Demonstrated technical leadership as a Staff Engineer, Founder, and technical workshop organizer.
Solid mobile platform knowledge, including iOS development and mobile device orchestration.
concerns: Lacks the required 2+ years of formal people management and performance evaluation experience.
No evidence of driving organizational change or managing engineering teams at a mid-to-senior level.
Resume heavily emphasizes individual contributor achievements over strategic team management.
